'''Low Priority''' is a European team.

==History==
Officially formed in March 2015, '''Low Priority''' were originally known as '''Code Gaming'''. They qualified for the [[2015 EU Challenger Series/Summer Qualifier|2015 EUCS Summer Qualifier]] via the [[2015_EU_Challenger_Series/Summer_Qualifier/Ladder|Challenger Ladder]].
